channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: England Test coach Brendon McCullum resigns after string of losses and off-field controversies
item.description: Brendon McCullum has been removed as England's Test head coach following a series of poor results and off-field issues. The decision comes after England's Test team lost seven of their last nine match...

item.title: Analyzing the Greens' Decline and Voter Shifts in Australian Politics
item.description: The article explores the political landscape in Australia, focusing on the contrasting fortunes of two anti-establishment parties: Pauline Hanson's right-wing populism and the Greens. Since the federa...

item.title: International University Partnerships Drive Sustainable Development and One Health Initiatives in the Caribbean
item.description: The article highlights collaborative efforts between universities in Grenada, Namibia, and other regions to address global challenges through interdisciplinary approaches. Key initiatives include the ...

item.title: Physiotherapist Mary Habila Died Under Mysterious Circumstances at Minister's Residence
item.description: A physiotherapist named Mary Habila was found dead in the residence of Nigeria's Works Minister David Umahi under unclear circumstances. SaharaReporters reports that her body was discovered naked when...

item.title: Commemoration of 10th Anniversary of WPS Arbitral Victory Honors PNoy's Leadership
item.description: Supporters of former President Benigno 'PNoy' Aquino III commemorated the 10th anniversary of the landmark South China Sea arbitral victory during a mass held at his gravesite in Manila Memorial Park....

item.title: Prince William and Kate Middleton attend London charity event to support local community initiatives
item.description: Prince William and Kate Middleton recently made a surprise visit to a charity event in London, showcasing their ongoing commitment to supporting local community initiatives. The event, organized by a ...

item.title: Escudero Accepts Role in Duterte Impeachment Trial Despite Not Seeking It
item.description: Senator Francis 'Chiz' Escudero, appointed as the presiding officer of Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial, clarified that while he did not seek the role, he is committed to fulfilling his...

item.title: Calgary’s Stefan Daniel Wins Silver Medal in World Para Triathlon Series Race
item.description: Stefan Daniel, a Calgary-based para-athlete, has claimed a silver medal at the world para-triathlon series race, showcasing his exceptional endurance and skill. The event, which attracted competitors ...

item.title: Grade 4 Student Dies Following School Deworming Program in Cavite
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) in Cavite has confirmed the tragic death of a Grade 4 pupil following a school-led deworming activity at Hugo Perez Elementary School-Annex. The incident, which occ...

item.title: Super Eagles Goalkeeper Stanley Nwabali Returns to Chippa United Ahead of 2026/27 Campaign
item.description: Stanley Nwabali, the Super Eagles' goalkeeper, has officially returned to Chippa United in South Africa, marking his comeback after a five-month hiatus. The 30-year-old player left the club in Februar...

item.title: Two men die after attempting to rescue children from the sea
item.description: Two men have tragically lost their lives while attempting to assist two children in distress at Seaton Carew beach, Hartlepool. Cleveland Police confirmed the incident occurred on 12 July 2026, when t...

item.title: Chadema Tackles Internal Criticisms Amid Leadership Controversy
item.description: Tanzania's main opposition party, Chadema, is facing public accusations against its leader Freeman Mbowe (Heche) as internal tensions and external criticism grow over the party's direction. The party,...

item.title: Government Updates on Migration Management Strategies

item.title: Indian tourists recount rescue efforts after fatal Vietnam boat accident as stranded travellers return to Hyderabad
item.description: Several Indian tourists who were stranded in Vietnam after a fatal boat accident near Phu Quoc Island returned to Hyderabad on the night of July 12 and shared their experiences of the tragedy. Mahipal...

item.title: DOJ's Admission of Epstein Files Could Lead to Legal Challenges
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) under former President Donald Trump faces potential legal repercussions after admitting to possessing key files related to the Jeffrey Epstein case. Analysts warn ...

item.title: Medical Examiner Reveals Cause of Death for Late Senator Lindsey Graham
item.description: Late U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham (R-SC) died after suffering an aortic dissection caused by arteriosclerotic cardiovascular disease, according to a report from the District of Columbia Medical Examine...

item.title: Nigeria's Oil Production Surpasses OPEC Quota for Second Month in June 2026
item.description: Nigeria's average daily crude oil and condensate production rose by 2.3 per cent to 1.74 million barrels per day (mbpd) in June 2026, surpassing its OPEC quota for the second consecutive month. The Ni...

item.title: India's Eco-Friendly Projects and Climate Change Efforts
item.description: The article highlights India's growing focus on eco-friendly initiatives as part of its strategy to combat climate change. It discusses the country's investments in renewable energy, such as solar and...

item.title: 2,500 Filipino Seafarers Stranded in Persian Gulf Amid US-Iran Conflict
item.description: Around 2,500 Filipino seafarers remain stranded in the Persian Gulf due to the escalating conflict between the US and Iran, according to the International Maritime Organization (IMO). The crisis has l...

item.title: APC Criticizes Opposition Parties for Missing INEC Deadline for 2027 Elections
item.description: The ruling All Progressives Congress (APC) has criticized opposition parties for failing to meet the initial deadline set by the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC) for submitting candida...
